sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110516" key="fellw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φελλώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n110516.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of cork</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bark,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:85" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.85</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
